  1. Home
  2. > Privacy Policy
Privacy First

Privacy Policy

We believe in complete transparency. Our tools are built to protect your data by converting it directly on your device.

100% Local Browser Processing

All text conversions (whether converting Krutidev to Unicode or Unicode to Krutidev) are executed entirely on your local computer or mobile device via JavaScript. Your text input and output are never transmitted to, processed by, or stored on any server.

Zero Storage of User Inputs

We do not log, save, or cache your typed or pasted characters. The moment you close or refresh this tab, the text you were converting is completely erased from your browser's active memory.

Minimal Cookies & Local Storage

We do not use advertising, marketing, or tracking cookies. We utilize your browser's local storage (`localStorage`) solely to store user preferences, such as your chosen interface theme (Dark Mode or Light Mode), so that your preference is remembered on your next visit.

Anonymous Web Analytics

To understand user volume and improve our tools, we may collect basic, anonymous traffic statistics (such as page views, device type, and referring links). This data is aggregated and does not contain personal identifying details, IP addresses, or any content related to your conversion text.

For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or data security, please feel free to contact us at support@fontconverterhub.com.
अ Font Converter Hub

A modern, secure, and fast developer utility for Hindi and Sanskrit font conversion. Convert Krutidev (classic typewriter font) to Unicode, and Unicode back to Krutidev seamlessly.

  • Unicode to Krutidev
